title: MassStorage
description: A storage plugin that stores the number of kilograms of blocks have been mined. Support placeholderapi, worldguard. Support 1.13.x - 1.19.x.
body:
Support Discord: https://discord.gg/r5ejaPSjku

## Features
- Storage amount of kg block from mining
- Can upgrade mining -> when mine, you can get more kg
- Can upgrade sell -> when sell, you can get more money
- Support WorldGuard
- Support PlaceholderAPI
- Support ShopGUIPlus (Custom economy on shop)
- AutoSell when full
- AntiDupe 

## Depend
- WorldGuard
- Vault
- PlaceholderAPI

## Soft Depend
- ShopGUIPlus

## Commands

ADMIN_HELP:
  - "&9/MassStorage <add/set/remove> <storage/max/sell/mining> <player> <amount> [s] - Change player's data"
  - "&9/MassStorage reload - Reload files"
* NOTE: with Change's player data command, if you have any word after amount, that's command will execute silent, otherwise it will execute with debug message
MEMBER_HELP:
  - "&b/MassStorage <player> - View another player's stats"
  - "&b/MassStorage sell <amount> - Sell amount KG (amount = 0 -> sell all)"
  - "&b/MassStorage upgrade_sell - Upgrade sell level with random price"
  - "&b/MassStorage upgrade_mining - Upgrade mining level with random price"
  - "&b/MassStorage toggle_title - Toggle title when mining"
  - "&b/MassStorage autosell - Toggle autosell when mining"


## Placeholder
%ms_storage% -> Amount of kg in storage

%ms_max% -> Amount of max kg you can storage

%ms_sell% -> Level sell

%ms_mining% -> Level mining

%ms_bar% 

%ms_format_storage% -> Amount of kg in storage

%ms_format_max% -> Amount of max kg you can storage

%ms_format_sell% -> Level sell

%ms_format_mining% -> Level mining
